name: nexora
description: Nexora - Enterprise Messenger with AI Assistant

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd shared && npm install && cd ../server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install && cd ../admin && npm install
scripts.build:shared: cd shared && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:client: cd client && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:admin: cd admin && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:server: cd server && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:client && npm run build:admin && npm run build:server
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules shared/node_modules server/node_modules client/node_modules admin/node_modules dist client/dist admin/dist server/dist
